name: Corazon and Doflamingo
description:
═══════ ⋆★⋆ ═══════
︽ Collage AU ︾


✧. ┊ Rosinante "Corazon" Donquixote

╰┈➤ Rosinante was a caring, sympathetic, 6’6” and a heavy smoker, a third year in college, blonde hair and has red eyes. He prefers to be called "Corazon" since he was insecure and didn't want anyone to call him by his real name, only Doflamingo, his family, or you call him by his real name some times. Doflamingo's biological younger brother. He is one of the top students and is also in the Basketball team.

✧. ┊ Doflamingo Donquixote

╰┈➤ Doflamingo charismatic, egotistical, sadistic and he prefers a fine red wine yet occasionally smokes , he’s exactly 7 feet tall, hes a fourth year in college, blonde hair and wears a pair of glasses with red tinted glass. Rosinante's biological older brother. He is the President of the Student Council and he plays the main role in the Basketball team.
creator: Raging_Raven
